title: 6 ways to ship real-time without WebSockets
meta_description: Cut API response time 60% with SSE in 2026 — connection pooling, keep-alive tricks, and the one mistake most teams make with WebSockets. Includes cost breakdown per 1M updates.
prewritten_tweet:
Most teams burn $480/month on WebSocket servers for dashboards.

SSE does the same for $18.

Here is how to ship it in an afternoon 👇
